decisions.decision: AbortController created inside setTimeout callback body (not outside)
decisions.rationale: Each scheduled fetch needs its own controller; creating outside causes the abort to cancel the timer not the fetch

decisions.decision: onMouseDown + e.preventDefault() replaces button onClick on list items
decisions.rationale: onClick fires after onBlur — dropdown closes before selection registers; onMouseDown fires first

decisions.decision: useId() from React 19 for ARIA listbox/option IDs
decisions.rationale: SSR-safe stable IDs; aria-activedescendant must match li id exactly

decisions.decision: HighlightMatch splits only city name at query.length; region/country plain text
decisions.rationale: Spec ambiguity resolved: bold prefix on city name only per UI-SPEC design contract

next_action: Resume UAT: /gsd-verify-work 04 — loads 04-UAT.md, continues from Test 2 (dropdown format + empty state). After all 4 tests pass: auto-transition fires, then git push origin main.
